titleEn: AgriFood Signals: Bayer wins roundup case, CEO change at Vow, Reservoir acquires Contain
titleZh: AgriFood Signals：拜耳草甘膦案胜诉、Vow CEO变更、Reservoir收购Contain
summaryZh: 本文是AgFunderNews的行业周报，汇总了农业科技与食品科技领域的最新融资、并购、人事变动及政策动态。核心事件包括：拜耳在美国最高法院赢得草甘膦诉讼案，阻止数千起诉讼；人造肉公司Vow因重组更换CEO；Reservoir收购Contain以加速农业机器人AI技术。此外还涉及多家初创公司融资（如Omni、Terraxy）、大企业并购（如达能收购澳洲乳企）、以及美国再生农业行政令等。整体信息密度高，但直接与智慧畜牧（IoT/AI/自动化）相关的内容较少，主要偏向农业生物技术、替代蛋白和政策。
featuredReason: 虽然本文并非专门聚焦智慧畜牧，但其中Reservoir收购Contain加速农业机器人AI、以及多项自动化/生物技术融资案例，可为畜牧智能化从业者提供跨界技术趋势参考，尤其是机器人、AI和生物制品的结合方向。
contentFull: AgriFood Signals: Bayer wins roundup case, CEO change at Vow, Reservoir acquires Contain June 26, 2026 | Jennifer Marston Agtech FoodTech Saudi Arabia-based Terraxy team. Image credit: Terraxy AgFunderNews rounds up the most important fundings, mergers, acquisitions, closures, and industry buzz in agtech and foodtech. Funding news 🇬🇧 Omni raises £11m Series A to fund US entry and an “Ozempic-style” dog supplement The Checkout 🇬🇧 Myota raises $4.5m to supply clinically backed fibre blends to F&B industry The Grocer 🇸🇦 Terraxy raises $3 million to scale desert greening and soil regeneration technology in Saudi Arabia iGrow News 🇦🇺 Coast 4C secures oversubscribed US$2.5 million seed round to scale smallholder seaweed farming in Southeast Asia Aquaculture Asia Pacific 🇬🇧 Fieldwork Robotics secures investment from Seed Innovations Fruitnet 🇫🇷 Kubota announces additional investment in French startup UV boosting, advanced plant resistance technology Kubota Image credit: Tropic M&A, IPOs & partnerships 🇬🇧 🇮🇱 Tropic acquires leading global plant propagation business Rahan Meristem Fresh Fruit Portal 🇫🇷 🇦🇺 Danone buys Australian dairy producer Made in Protein Push Bloomberg 🇺🇸 Zume Pizza technology is acquired by Flippy owner Miso Nation’s Restaurant News 🇺🇸 Reservoir acquires Contain to accelerate rugged physical AI agtech startups Dealroom 🇳🇱 Schouten buys fellow Dutch plant-based meat player to expand Europe footprint Green Queen Funds, grants & accelerators 🇬🇧 UK: New £53 million investment for growing innovation Horti Daily 🇧🇪 Zymofix receives €1.9M grant FinSMEs 🇱🇺 🇯🇵 European and Japanese impact firms team up to launch $75m blue economy fund Impact Loop People moves 🇦🇺 CEO shakeup at Vow amid restructure at lab-grown meat startup Forbes 🇬🇧 Former brand chief returns to lead The Vegetarian Butcher Collective Vegconomist Image credit: Liberation Bioindustries Other news 🇺🇸 Supreme Court ruling blocks thousands of lawsuits against the maker of Roundup weedkiller AP News 🇬🇧 British EUDR? UK government to introduce anti-deforestation rules Food Navigator 🇫🇷 Micropep Technologies files for regulatory approval of Promisin biofungicide in Brazil and Paraguay iGrow News 🇦🇺 Goterra administrator seeks buyer as founder warns of insect ag sector ‘contagion’ AgFunderNews 🇺🇸 President Trump signs executive order advancing regenerative agriculture; Secretary Rollins announces USDA rule to unlock billions for American farmers USDA 🇺🇸 Seaweed yarn maker Keel Labs files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy Yahoo Finance 🇺🇸 Liberation Bioindustries pauses construction again as it seeks funds to complete US biomanufacturing site AgFunderNews Share this article Sign up for our weekly newsletter. The Protein Brewery says FDA GRAS setback won’t derail US plans as it raises $20.5m Series B extension Alternative protein Biomanufacturing & biologicals Liberation Bioindustries pauses construction again as it seeks funds to complete US biomanufacturing site Biomanufacturing & biologicals Deeptech The Protein Brewery says FDA GRAS setback won’t derail US plans as it raises $20.5m Series B extension Alternative protein Biomanufacturing & biologicals Liberation Bioindustries pauses construction again as it seeks funds to complete US biomanufacturing site Biomanufacturing & biologicals Deeptech
translationZh:
AgriFood Signals：拜耳草甘膦案胜诉、Vow CEO变更、Reservoir收购Contain
2026年6月26日 | Jennifer Marston

Agtech FoodTech
总部位于沙特阿拉伯的Terraxy团队。图片来源：Terraxy

AgFunderNews汇总了农业科技和食品科技领域最重要的融资、并购、关闭及行业动态。

融资新闻
🇬🇧 Omni融资1100万英镑A轮，用于进入美国市场并推出“类似Ozempic”的狗用补充剂 The Checkout
🇬🇧 Myota融资450万美元，为食品饮料行业提供临床支持的纤维混合物 The Grocer
🇸🇦 Terraxy融资300万美元，在沙特阿拉伯推广沙漠绿化与土壤再生技术 iGrow News
🇦🇺 Coast 4C获得超额认购的250万美元种子轮融资，用于扩大东南亚小农海藻养殖 Aquaculture Asia Pacific
🇬🇧 Fieldwork Robotics获得Seed Innovations投资 Fruitnet
🇫🇷 Kubota宣布对法国初创公司UV boosting追加投资，涉及先进植物抗性技术 Kubota
图片来源：Tropic

并购、IPO及合作
🇬🇧 🇮🇱 Tropic收购全球领先植物繁殖企业Rahan Meristem Fresh Fruit Portal
🇫🇷 🇦🇺 达能收购澳大利亚乳制品生产商Made in Protein，进军植物蛋白领域 Bloomberg
🇺🇸 Zume Pizza技术被Flippy母公司Miso收购 Nation's Restaurant News
🇺🇸 Reservoir收购Contain，加速农业机器人AI初创公司发展 Dealroom
🇳🇱 Schouten收购荷兰植物基肉类同行，扩大欧洲市场版图 Green Queen

基金、资助及加速器
🇬🇧 英国：新设5300万英镑投资用于促进创新 Horti Daily
🇧🇪 Zymofix获得190万欧元资助 FinSMEs
🇱🇺 🇯🇵 欧洲和日本影响力投资公司联合设立7500万美元蓝色经济基金 Impact Loop

人事变动
🇦🇺 人造肉初创公司Vow因重组更换CEO Forbes
🇬🇧 前品牌负责人回归领导The Vegetarian Butcher Collective Vegconomist
图片来源：Liberation Bioindustries

其他新闻
🇺🇸 美国最高法院裁决阻止数千起针对草甘膦除草剂制造商拜耳的诉讼 AP News
🇬🇧 英国EUDR？英国政府将引入反森林砍伐法规 Food Navigator
🇫🇷 Micropep Technologies在巴西和巴拉圭申请Promisin生物杀菌剂监管批准 iGrow News
🇦🇺 Goterra管理人寻求买家，创始人警告昆虫农业领域存在“传染效应” AgFunderNews
🇺🇸 特朗普总统签署行政令推进再生农业；农业部长Rollins宣布USDA规则，为美国农民释放数十亿美元 USDA
🇺🇸 海藻纱线制造商Keel Labs申请第11章破产保护 Yahoo Finance
🇺🇸 Liberation Bioindustries再次暂停建设，寻求资金完成美国生物制造基地 AgFunderNews

生物制造与生物制品
Liberation Bioindustries再次暂停建设，寻求资金完成美国生物制造基地 AgFunderNews
author: Jennifer Marston
